The '''Yankirk Route''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. This hyperlane was one of several routes that intersected at [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]], in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]], along with the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]], and the [[Lipsec Run/Legends|Lipsec Run]]. The Yankirk Route was a more local route than these other hyperlanes.
